return(function(p,R,d,A,n,W,l,H,E,M,v,z,s,t,w,y,U,a,f,o,B,S,L,G,j)s,j,E,v,o,S,y,f,a,G,B,z,L,H,U,t,M,w=function(p,V)local R=y(V)local d=function(d,A,n,W,l)return v(p,{d,A;n;W,l},V,R)end return d
